source_expectation.quality_estimate_target: 8/10 or better intake for accessory cleanup and anchor review

refinement_checklist: Run raw asset audit and preview render.
Assign intended wardrobe slot and anchor strategy.
Record any avatar-body or bone dependency needed for fitting.
Escalate to manual gate when anchor review or weight transfer is still human-only.
validation_checklist: Manual gate notes make registry and attachment assumptions explicit.
manual_gate_notes: Current implementation has no generic auto-fit helper for every accessory class.
Unity runtime accessory handoff registry intake now exists, but live equip mapping still remains planned work.
